# Turkiye Non-Dom

> Independent English-language information about Turkey's 20-year exemption for qualifying foreign-source income under repeated Article 20/D of the Turkish Income Tax Law.

Turkey Non-Dom is a market description, not the official legal name of the regime. Turkey's official international name is Turkiye. The website uses Turkey where natural for English-language readers and search.

## Current legal status

- Law No. 7582 is enacted and applies to qualifying individuals treated as settled in Turkey from 1 January 2026.
- As last verified on 20 June 2026, implementing Income Tax General Communique No. 333 remains a draft.
- The exemption is not a general exemption from Turkish tax. Income-source classification, residence timing and the previous three calendar years matter.
- Remote work performed in Turkey is not automatically foreign-source income.

- [Main guide and eligibility screen](https://mikhail1250.github.io/TND/)

- [XML sitemap](https://mikhail1250.github.io/TND/sitemap.xml)

## Primary sources

- [Law No. 7582, Official Gazette](https://www.resmigazete.gov.tr/eskiler/2026/06/20260604-1.htm)
- [Turkish Revenue Administration page for draft Communique No. 333](https://www.gib.gov.tr/mevzuat/taslak/24)
- [Turkish Revenue Administration legislation database](https://www.gib.gov.tr/mevzuat)

## Commercial offer

The planned first edition of the Turkey Non-Dom Living Guide has an introductory price of EUR 89. It includes general educational material and material updates for 12 months. No payment is requested before publication. It is not personalised legal or tax advice.
